headline: Hims & Hers C-suite shake-up, Stryker outage may be Iran-backed
summary: Yahoo Finance anchor Josh Lipton tracks Wednesday's top moving stocks and biggest market stories in this Market Minute. Hims & Hers Health (HIMS) stock is soaring after the company named Katherine Beir as its next chief communications officer, reporting to CEO Andrew Dudum. Stryker Corporation (SYK) stock is under pressure amid a global outage that could be tied to an Iran-backed hacking group. Stay up to date on the latest market action, minute-by-minute, with Yahoo Finance's Market Minute.

headline: Josh Brown: Biotech growth stocks immune to disruption risk
summary: Josh Brown, CEO of Ritholtz Wealth Management, made a pointed claim on CNBC’s Halftime Report this week about large-cap biotech: “These are growth stocks where you don’t have to worry about disruption. They’re breaking out.” His reasoning is that companies dealing in molecules, proteins, and clinical trials occupy a fundamentally different risk category than software ... Josh Brown: Biotech growth stocks immune to disruption risk

headline: Hims & Hers Adds Communications Leader As Expansion And Novo Story Evolve
summary: Hims & Hers Health (NYSE:HIMS) has appointed Kathryn Beiser as Chief Communications Officer. Beiser will report directly to the CEO and lead communications as the company enters a new US and international expansion phase. She brings experience from prior senior roles at Eli Lilly, Discover, Kaiser Permanente, and Edelman in highly regulated industries. Hims & Hers Health, trading at $23.47, has seen very large gains over the past three years, with a 170.4% return, and a 43.3% return over...

headline: Wolfe bumps Eli Lilly target on oral obesity drug, cardiometabolic portfolio
summary: Investing.com -- Eli Lilly could see a larger commercial opportunity for its experimental oral obesity drug orforglipron, Wolfe analyst said, raising its price target as it expects strong long-term demand and continued dominance in the weight-loss market. The price target on the drugmaker is $1325 raised from $1250. Lilly is Outperform rated after higher long-term sales estimates for orforglipron, which Wolfe now expects could generate peak annual revenue of about $44 billion, up from $32 billio

headline: Andel Launches New Direct-to-Employer Medication Platform to Make GLP-1s Affordable for Millions
summary: Today, Andel announced the launch of its app and medication platform, giving companies a new way to make GLP-1s an accessible employee benefit. The company is excited to announce that Eli Lilly and Company's newly-approved Zepbound® KwikPen® will be the inaugural medication available on the Andel platform.

headline: Eli Lilly Taps Samsung Biologics To Grow Korean Biotech And Long Term Value
summary: Eli Lilly (NYSE:LLY) and Samsung Biologics have agreed to launch a Gateway Labs partnership in Korea. The collaboration will create a new facility offering lab space, operational support, and access to Eli Lilly’s global expertise for early stage biotech companies. This is the first expansion of Eli Lilly’s Gateway Labs R&D incubator outside the U.S., with a focus on Korea’s growing biotech ecosystem. Eli Lilly, trading at $1,001.35, has had a 5-year return of about 4.5x and a 1-year return...

headline: Hims & Hers Names Kathryn Beiser as Chief Communications Officer
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 11, 2026--Hims & Hers Health, Inc. (NYSE: HIMS), the leading global health and wellness platform, today announced the appointment of Kathryn Beiser as Chief Communications Officer. In this role, Beiser will lead external and internal communications for the company as it enters a new phase of domestic and international growth.
